testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Duplicate step definitions in com.skillio.stepdefinitions.MyInfoSteps.userClicksSaveButton() and com.skillio.stepdefinitions.PimSteps.userClicksSaveButton()

testcase.failure: io.cucumber.core.runner.DuplicateStepDefinitionException: Duplicate step definitions in com.skillio.stepdefinitions.MyInfoSteps.userClicksSaveButton() and
